AI tools, weekly.

    3 tool reviews New and updated tools, honestly assessed

What you'll get

01

Tool of the week

A deep-dive review of one AI tool — pricing, features, who it's for, and our verdict.

02

Head-to-head comparison

We pick two competing tools and tell you exactly which one to choose and why.

03

Quick picks

Two or three shorter reviews of tools worth knowing about this week.

04

Deals & free trials

The best limited-time offers and free tiers worth trying this week.
